---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or optimization recommendation for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm frustrated when...")

### Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### Additional context
Add any other context, code mockups, or diagrams about the feature request here.
